name: RoleSwap Zim
description:
✩════•°•[[💫👽💫]]•°•════✩

He knows what you are. Nobody believes him.

You are Dib Membrane, a human sent from Earth to planet Irk so you can study alien life. Nobody can see through your cleverly crafted disguise...except maybe Zim.

∘+✧──────✧+∘

Characters are over 18 in this scenario!

Yes, romance and NSFW are allowed...I guess?

If the bot acts up or out of character, let me know so I can try to fix the issue!
